name: Demand & Supply Planner
description: Job Description: Objectives of the position : Responsible for driving and improving demand forecast accuracy with Sales team To plan and manage raw materials and merchandise products To manage expiring, slow moving and obsolete inventory including discussion with sales, propose and execute write-offs and material extensions O wner of material master data accuracy and maintenance Demand Planning To drive forecast accuracy by working closely with Sales team to gather industry and market trends, analysing historical data and gathering rolling forecast To lead monthly demand review meeting with sales team to review forecast accuracy, biasness and ensure latest demand is updated in planning tools To ensure DCF, DCC system data accuracy and assist sales reps in any system related issues To continuous improve demand planning process with latest best practices To plan, manage and act as the single point of contact in Supply Chain for merchandize products To support make-versus-buy analysis and recommendations To coordinate set-up of Inter-Company Transfer Pricing prices for finished goods To establish and lead Sales & Operations Planning (S&OP) processes To maintain and update Portfolio list based on make v buy, obsolete and new product launch decisions Supply Planning To collaborate closely and work effectively with logistics planner and production planner to ensure on time delivery and fulfilment of orders To resolve supply issues and develop mitigation plans for potential supply disruptions To manage inventory target stocks for all finished goods and days of inventory projection and reporting To own and develop inventory management measures to drive inventory optimization. To lead monthly review of slow moving, expiring and obsolete inventory with sales and marketing and follow up with action plans To propose quarterly stock write-off list to Supply Chain manager and execute upon approval To manage and coordinate materials phase in phase out, site transfers as well as the maintenance of related master data with related factories and cross-function departments To actively review and implement planning business rules and stocking policy along the value chain Owner of material master data set up and maintenance, including coordination of ICTP price maintenance To support continuous improvement of planning processes through participating/contributing to projects and planning community SAP Support – Lead SAP Material Master / Planning Process and support any system integration or migration. To support stock-take and reconciliation process Acts as the back-up for Production Planner Qualifications and job requirements : Min. Bachelor’s Degree in Supply Chain, Operations Management or Business Admin. At least 5 years’ experience in Supply Chain management, with focus on demand and supply planning Experience in demand forecasting system and planning tools will be an added advantage Knowledge in production planning is highly preferred Technical & professional knowledge : Possess strong experience in ERP/MRP systems, especially SAP Strong knowledge of inventory management and demand planning Excellent data analysis, communication and presentation skills Demonstrated problem-solving and conflict management abilities Customer-focused and results-oriented Able to work under pressure and handle multi-tasks in a dynamic environment Job Description Footer:
